title: Restore engine — batching, progress, verify, deferred objects
description:
Implementasi fase-fase restore:

1. Pre-flight Check — validasi max_allowed_packet, set fast mode variables (autocommit=0, unique_checks=0, foreign_key_checks=0)
2. Batch execution — grouping statements, COMMIT tiap ~64MB / ~1000 statements
3. Implicit-Commit Statement detection — forced checkpoint BEFORE DDL/LOCK TABLES/LOAD DATA
4. Progress reporting — byte-based (byte_offset / dump_size_bytes), TTY-adaptive
5. Resume — auto-resume dari checkpoint, Resume Batch dengan toleransi error 1062/1050
6. Verify — CHECK TABLE EXTENDED, FK violations vs Corrupt detection
7. Deferred Objects — capture CREATE VIEW/TRIGGER/ROUTINE DEFINER errors (1227/1449), replay
8. Interrupt — two-signal pattern (graceful drain + abort)
9. Exit code classification — 0/1/3/4/130/143

Refer: ADR-0001, ADR-0004, ADR-0006, ADR-0008, ADR-0009, ADR-0010, ADR-0011, ADR-0012, ADR-0013, ADR-0019, ADR-0020, ADR-0021, ADR-0022, ADR-0027, ADR-0028, ADR-0029, ADR-0030

Acceptance:
- Restore bisa jalan end-to-end dengan dump file
- Resume dari checkpoint bekerja
- Progress bar muncul di terminal (TTY-adaptive)
- Verify mendeteksi FK violations
- Deferred objects bisa di-replay
design: Package internal/restore-engine/. Executor struct orchestrates phases. Progress reporter sebagai interface.
acceptance_criteria: Integration test: restore dump → verify → replay cycle
notes: Fast mode: tool OWNS autocommit/unique_checks/foreign_key_checks — reset ke 1 di setiap exit path.

title: Go project scaffolding — module init, directory structure, tooling
description:
Inisialisasi Go module untuk mariadb-restorer. Buat go.mod, struktur direktori (cmd/, internal/, pkg/), konfigurasi linter (.golangci.yml), dan GitHub Actions CI workflow.

Stack: Go 1.22, modernc/sqlite (no cgo), bubbletea TUI
Struktur: cmd/mariadb-restorer/ (main), internal/ (domain logic), pkg/ (shared utilities)
Tooling: golangci-lint, go vet, gitnexus

Acceptance:
- go.mod terdefinisi dengan dependency yang benar
- go build berhasil tanpa error
- go vet lulus
- Struktur direktori sesuai konvensi Go standar
design: Struktur direktori mengikuti https://go.dev/doc/modules/layout. Root package di cmd/mariadb-restorer/. Domain logic di internal/ dipisah per context (restore-engine, credential-vault).
acceptance_criteria: go build && go vet lulus; struktur direktori konsisten dengan CONTEXT-MAP.md

title: Core restore engine — checkpoint store + statement splitter
description:
Implementasi core domain logic untuk restore engine:

1. Checkpoint Store — SQLite store (modernc/sqlite) untuk persist byte_offset, dump_identity, dan lexer state. Satu row per dump (UPSERT). PRAGMA synchronous=FULL.
2. Statement Splitter — State-aware streaming lexer yang memisahkan statements berdasarkan delimiter, state (quote, backtick, comment, executable comment), dan sql_mode (no_backslash_escapes, ansi_quotes).
3. Dump Identity — Fast fingerprint (head hash + file size).

Refer: ADR-0005, ADR-0023, ADR-0024, ADR-0025, ADR-0026, ADR-0018.

Acceptance:
- Checkpoint store bisa create/read/update/delete row per dump_identity
- Statement splitter bisa memisahkan statements dari dump stream
- Lexer state di-snapshot ke checkpoint
design: Package internal/restore-engine/. CheckpointStore struct wraps SQLite. StatementSplitter struct implements io.Reader-like interface.
acceptance_criteria: SQLite file ter-create di Data Directory; splitter handle semua state transitions
notes: ADR-0023: splitter adalah state-aware streaming lexer, bukan naive delimiter split. ADR-0024: scan raw bytes, bukan decoded runes.

title: CLI command structure — subcommands & flag parsing
description:
Implementasi CLI entry point dengan subcommands:

- mariadb-restorer restore <file>
- mariadb-restorer profile save|list|delete|rename|set-password
- mariadb-restorer replay
- mariadb-restorer verify
- mariadb-restorer tui

Flags: --data-dir, --profile, --verify, --restart, --force-resume, --timeout, --read-timeout, --write-timeout, --progress, --password-file, --password, --yes, --no-color, NO_COLOR, --demo

Refer: ADR-0020 (auto-resume), ADR-0030 (error classification)

Acceptance:
- go run . restore --help menampilkan help yang jelas
- Subcommands parsing bekerja dengan benar
- Exit codes sesuai spesifikasi (0/1/3/4/130/143)
design: cmd/mariadb-restorer/main.go sebagai entry point. Subcommands di cmd/mariadb-restorer/commands/. Gunakan flag.FlagSet standar.
acceptance_criteria: Setiap subcommand bisa dipanggil; help menampilkan usage; unknown flag memberi error jelas
notes: Tidak ada subcommand resume — restore auto-resume via ADR-0020.

title: Credential vault — AES-256-GCM + connection profile CRUD
description:
Implementasi Credential Vault dan Connection Profile management:

1. Credential Vault — AES-256-GCM encryption. Argon2id KDF (memory=64MiB, time=3, threads=4). AAD binding: profile-id + vault-id.
2. Connection Profile — CRUD untuk named profiles (host, port, user, database). Sealed password inline.
3. Credential Source Resolution — Precedence chain: --password-file > --password > vault > MYSQL_PWD > TTY prompt.
4. set-password — Seal/unseal password ke vault.
5. Profile rename — Deteksi AAD change, prompt re-seal.

Refer: ADR-0007, ADR-0014, ADR-0015, ADR-0016, ADR-0017.

Acceptance:
- Vault init dengan Master Passphrase
- Password bisa di-seal dan di-unseal dengan benar
- AAD mismatch menyebabkan authentication error
- Profile rename trigger re-seal prompt
- Credential source precedence bekerja sesuai ADR-0017
design: Package internal/credential-vault/. Vault struct dengan methods: Init, Seal, Open. ProfileStore struct untuk CRUD profile.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./internal/credential-vault/... lulus; seal→unseal round-trip; AAD mismatch detected
notes: ADR-0014: KDF parameters fix (64MiB memory). ADR-0016: Sealed password inline di profile row.

title: Profile manager screen — CRUD UI
description:
Implementasi Profile Manager screen TUI:

1. Daftar connection profiles dengan kolom: name, host:port, user, database, password status (vaulted/—)
2. Create profile — form dengan fields: name, host, port, user, database
3. Edit profile — pre-populated form, update non-secret fields
4. Delete profile — konfirmasi y/N
5. Rename profile — deteksi sealed_password, prompt for Master Passphrase re-seal
6. Set-password — form entry + confirmation (entry twice), seal to vault
7. Search/filter profiles by name or host
8. Optional connection validation — TCP dial host:port (5s timeout), green check / red X
9. Vaulted indicator — never show password length/prefix/plaintext

Refer: docs/prd/tui-mode.md — User Stories 3, 15, 16, 17, 18, 29, 30, 31

Acceptance:
- Semua CRUD operations bekerja
- Rename profile dengan vaulted password prompt re-seal
- Delete profile tidak perlu passphrase
- Search filter by nama atau host
design: Package internal/tui/screens/profiles/. Form component untuk input fields. Table component untuk daftar profiles.
acceptance_criteria: create→edit→delete flow; vaulted indicator correct; search works
notes: Data dari ProfileStore — TUI hanya presentation layer. ADR-0015: rename trigger re-seal karena AAD berubah.

title: Restore launcher wizard screen
description:
Implementasi Restore Launcher wizard TUI:

1. Step 1: Select dump file — file picker atau text input dengan tab completion
2. Step 2: Select connection profile — list saved profiles + Create New option
3. Step 3: Confirm settings — tampilkan resolved credential source, Fast Mode status, timeout values
4. Step 4: Toggle --verify option
5. Step 5: Launch — start restore, transition ke Live Progress Monitor
6. Credential source transparency — tampilkan darimana password berasal (vault/file/env/prompt)
7. Fast Mode indicator — show active session variables
8. Back button di setiap step

Refer: docs/prd/tui-mode.md — User Stories 5, 10, 20, 32

Acceptance:
- Wizard multi-step dengan navigasi Next/Back/Cancel
- Credential source ditampilkan di confirmation step
- Launch memulai restore engine dan transisi ke progress screen
design: Package internal/tui/screens/launcher/. WizardStep interface. Masing-masing step adalah sub-screen.
acceptance_criteria: Full wizard flow: file → profile → confirm → launch → progress screen
notes: Restore engine dijalankan di goroutine, progress via channel. ADR-0017: credential source precedence ditampilkan.

title: TUI framework layer & screen router (Bubble Tea)
description:
Implementasi infrastruktur TUI:

1. Bubble Tea program setup — tea.NewProgram dengan custom input/output
2. Screen router — navigation stack, screen transitions (Esc back, q quit)
3. Global shortcuts — ? help, g glossary, h home, p profiles, r new restore
4. Footer hints — konteks-sensitive shortcut bar
5. Universal color scheme — Lip Gloss styling, NO_COLOR support
6. TTY detection — exit dengan error jika non-interactive
7. Min 80x24 terminal check

Refer: docs/prd/tui-mode.md — Screen Architecture, Keyboard Shortcuts, Color Scheme, Accessibility

Acceptance:
- Router bisa navigate antar screens
- Global shortcuts bekerja di semua screen
- Footer hints berubah sesuai screen aktif
- Warna terbaca di dark & light terminal
design: Package internal/tui/. Screen interface dengan Init/Update/View. Router struct dengan stack of screens.
acceptance_criteria: Navigation test: Home → Profiles → Editor → Back → Home
notes: Bubble Tea model (Elm architecture). Setiap screen adalah tea.Model. Router composite pattern.

title: Home screen — restore history viewer
description:
Implementasi Home screen TUI yang menampilkan restore history:

1. Daftar semua restore dari Checkpoint Store (satu row per dump_identity)
2. Status indicators: In Progress, Resumable, Completed
3. Resume detection — bandingkan dump_identity, warning jika mismatch
4. Force-resume override untuk identity mismatch
5. Dump identity (hash prefix) ditampilkan bersama path
6. Active Data Directory path ditampilkan di startup
7. Delete checkpoint action dengan konfirmasi

Refer: docs/prd/tui-mode.md — User Stories 2, 7, 19, 23, 34, 35

Acceptance:
- Checkpoint rows muncul di list dengan status yang benar
- Mismatch identity menampilkan warning dan disable one-click resume
- Force-resume tersedia sebagai explicit override
- Delete row dengan konfirmasi y/N
design: Package internal/tui/screens/home/. Tabel dengan Bubble Tea Bubble table component.
acceptance_criteria: List menampilkan data dari SQLite; status correct berdasarkan byte_offset vs dump_size
notes: Data dari Checkpoint Store — TUI hanya presentation layer.

title: Post-restore report screen
description:
Implementasi Post-Restore Report screen TUI:

1. Exit Code decoding — 0/1/3/4/130/143 dengan penjelasan human-readable
2. Exit Code 0: Restore completed successfully + summary (statements, time elapsed)
3. Exit Code 1: Fatal Error + error message + resume available
4. Exit Code 3: Deferred Objects + count, Replay Now action
5. Exit Code 4: Verify findings breakdown (FK violations vs Corrupt), Corrupt flagged as potential false positive
6. Exit Code 130/143: Interrupted (user stop) + resume available
7. Summary statistics: total statements, bytes processed, elapsed time, batch count
8. Tindakan: Resume (jika applicable), Replay (jika deferred), Back to Home
9. Verify results stream — tampilkan CHECK TABLE results as they arrive

Refer: docs/prd/tui-mode.md — User Stories 8, 9, 20, 21, 33

Acceptance:
- Setiap exit code menampilkan pesan yang benar
- Replay action trigger replay command
- Verify findings ter-decode dengan benar (FK vs Corrupt)
design: Package internal/tui/screens/report/. ReportModel struct dengan exit code decoder.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 exit codes ter-decode dengan benar; Replay action executes
notes: ADR-0030: error classification. ADR-0013/0020: exit code 3 vs 4 distinct. ADR-0022: interrupt exit codes.

title: Live progress monitor screen
description:
Implementasi Live Progress Monitor TUI:

1. Progress bar — byte-based (byte_offset / dump_size_bytes), persentase
2. Statement counter — statements_done sebagai secondary counter
3. Byte offset & throughput — MB/s display
4. ETA — estimated time remaining
5. Batch commit counter — jumlah batch selesai
6. Deferred object counter — jika ada deferred selama restore
7. Ctrl-C interrupt — graceful drain (first signal) / abort (second signal)
8. Fast Mode indicator — tampilkan autocommit=0, unique_checks=0, foreign_key_checks=0
9. Auto-transition ke Post-Restore Report saat selesai

Progress events diterima via channel dari restore engine goroutine.

Refer: docs/prd/tui-mode.md — User Stories 6, 10, 21, 22, 27

Acceptance:
- Progress bar update real-time dari channel events
- Ctrl-C trigger graceful drain
- Completion auto-transition ke report screen
design: Package internal/tui/screens/progress/. ProgressModel struct dengan channel subscriber.
acceptance_criteria: Progress updates dari channel; Ctrl-C interrupt; Fast Mode indicator visible
notes: Progress events per batch commit. TUI tetap responsive selama streaming berkat tea.Model.Update. ADR-0021: byte-based progress.

title: Help & glossary screens
description:
Implementasi Help/Discovery system TUI:

1. Help screen — daftar semua keyboard shortcuts, ter-group per kategori
2. Glossary screen — definisi domain terms: Statement Boundary, Checkpoint, Batch, Resume Batch, Deferred Object, Credential Vault, Master Passphrase, Fast Mode, Verify
3. Definisi bersumber dari CONTEXT.md vocabulary
4. Dapat diakses dari screen mana pun via ? (help) atau g (glossary)
5. Esc kembali ke screen sebelumnya
6. Onboarding overlay — ditampilkan di first launch (dismissable), tidak muncul lagi

Refer: docs/prd/tui-mode.md — User Stories 11, 12, 28

Acceptance:
- Help screen list semua shortcuts
- Glossary screen tampilkan domain terms dengan definisi yang sesuai CONTEXT.md
- Onboarding overlay muncul sekali saja
design: Package internal/tui/screens/help/. HelpModel dan GlossaryModel sebagai sub-screens.
acceptance_criteria: ? opens help; g opens glossary; onboarding appears first launch only
notes: Markdown-style rendering untuk definisi. Onboarding detected via marker file di Data Directory.

title: Demo mode & final polish
description:
Implementasi Demo Mode dan polish akhir TUI:

1. Demo mode (--demo flag) — synthetic data:
   - Pre-populated profiles (staging, prod, dev)
   - Fake restore history (one completed, one resumable, one failed)
   - Simulated live restore (progress bar ticking up without DB connection)
   - In-memory state (tidak menyentuh Data Directory)
   - Banner: DEMO MODE — no actual operations
2. Error handling — inline error messages pada semua operasi yang bisa fail
3. Status bar — bottom bar dengan konteks (active Data Directory, current screen)
4. Keyboard shortcut reference — footer hints per screen
5. Universal color scheme testing — dark & light terminal
6. Help screen integration dengan demo context

Refer: docs/prd/tui-mode.md — User Stories 25, 26, 27, 35, Error Handling and Feedback

Acceptance:
- --demo launches dengan synthetic data
- Demo mode tidak menyentuh Data Directory
- Error messages muncul inline (red text)
- Warna terbaca di dark & light terminal
design: Package internal/tui/demo/. DemoSyntheticData struct. Banner component untuk DEMO MODE notice.
acceptance_criteria: bd run . tui --demo launches TUI dengan synthetic data; banner DEMO MODE visible
notes: Demo mode penting untuk onboarding pengguna baru tanpa perlu dump file atau DB.
